items.title: JavaScript execution and DOM mutation after parse
items.reason: The suite is for plain static HTML rendering; script markup is tested only as inert/raw-text content.

items.title: Navigation, history, storage, workers, and browsing-context APIs
items.reason: These APIs require a browser runtime rather than a static document renderer.

items.title: Live media playback, seeking, tracks, and media event sequencing
items.reason: Static poster/fallback/resource behavior is in scope; time-based playback behavior is not.

items.title: Form submission over the network
items.reason: The suite tests static form control rendering and metadata, not HTTP submission.

items.title: Editing commands, drag and drop events, and live user event processing
items.reason: Static states and metadata are in scope; event dispatch and editing command APIs are not.

items.title: Canvas drawing APIs
items.reason: Canvas fallback rendering and static sizing are in scope; script-driven drawing APIs are not.
